meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode AppSec Village - Kelley Robinson - 2FA in 2020 and Beyond
meta.description: Security professionals agree: SMS based Two-factor Authentication (2FA) is insecure, yet thousands of companies still employ this method to secure their customer-facing applications. This talk will look at the evolution of authentication and provide a data-driven analysis of the tradeoffs between the different types of factors available.
